name: youtube-hover-actions
description: Chrome extension that exposes YouTube card menu actions on hover.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && tsup && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('manifest.json', 'dist/manifest.json'); fs.copyFileSync('popup.html', 'dist/popup.html'); fs.cpSync('icons', 'dist/icons', { recursive: true });"
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && node --import tsx --test test/**/*.test.ts
scripts.lint: npm run typecheck && eslint src/**/*.ts test/**/*.ts
scripts.format: npm run typecheck && prettier --write src/**/*.ts test/**/*.ts
scripts.format:check: npm run typecheck && prettier --check src/**/*.ts test/**/*.ts
